_comment_routes: SPA fallback: every unknown path serves /index.html so React Router (or whatever client routing the app uses) can handle it. Vercel's `rewrites` is the right primitive — `redirects` would change the URL bar.
_comment_headers: Same security headers as public/_headers (Cloudflare/Netlify format). Vercel uses this `headers` array. The CSP allows: self-hosted assets, WASM (Argon2), inline styles (Recharts), official LUCKYPROTOCOL indexer + mempool.space connect-src. See public/_headers for the per-line rationale.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://luckyprotocolai.com https://mempool.space; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), bluetooth=()
